glosses.nb: sette seg på huk; huke seg
glosses.ro: a se pune pe vine; a se ghemui
glosses.da: sætte sig på hug; hukke sig
glosses.ja: しゃがむ; うずくまる

sentences.target: Je m'accroupis pour ramasser la clé.

translations.fr: Je m'accroupis pour ramasser la clé.
translations.en: I crouch down to pick up the key.
translations.es: Me agacho para recoger la llave.
translations.de: Ich gehe in die Hocke, um den Schlüssel aufzuheben.
translations.it: Mi accovaccio per raccogliere la chiave.
translations.pt: Eu me agacho para pegar a chave.
translations.he: אני מתכופף כדי להרים את המפתח.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi xuống để nhặt chìa khóa.
translations.nl: Ik hurk om de sleutel op te rapen.
translations.hi: मैं चाबी उठाने के लिए झुकता हूँ.
translations.el: Σκύβω για να μαζέψω το κλειδί.
translations.nb: Jeg setter meg på huk for å plukke opp nøkkelen.
translations.sv: Jag hukar mig för att plocka upp nyckeln.
translations.ro: Mă aplec ca să ridic cheia.
translations.da: Jeg sætter mig på hug for at samle nøglen op.
translations.ja: 鍵を拾うためにしゃがむ。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the subject of the main verb.
Clitic reflexive pronoun agreeing with the subject (1st singular), attached before the pronominal verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; used pronominally with the reflexive clitic.
Subordinating conjunction introducing an infinitival clause of purpose.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'pour'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines the following noun.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'ramasser'.

sentences.target: Tu préfères t'accroupir près des enfants.

translations.fr: Tu préfères t'accroupir près des enfants.
translations.en: You prefer to squat near the kids.
translations.es: Prefieres agacharte junto a los niños.
translations.de: Du gehst lieber neben den Kindern in die Hocke.
translations.ko: 너는 아이들 옆에서 쭈그려 앉는 걸 더 좋아한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你更喜欢在孩子旁边蹲着。
translations.yue: 你較鍾意喺小朋友旁邊蹲低。
translations.ru: Ты предпочитаешь приседать рядом с детьми.
translations.pt: Você prefere se agachar perto das crianças.
translations.vi: Bạn thích ngồi xổm cạnh बọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Je hurkt liever bij de kinderen.
translations.uk: Ти волієш присідати поруч із дітьми.
translations.hu: Jobban szeretsz a gyerekek mellett guggolni.
translations.hi: तुम्हें बच्चों के पास उकड़ूँ बैठना ज़्यादा पसंद है.
translations.el: Προτιμάς να σκύβεις δίπλα στα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Du foretrekker å sette deg på huk ved siden av barna.
translations.id: Kamu lebih suka berjongkok di dekat anak-anak.
translations.sv: Du föredrar att huka dig bredvid barnen.
translations.ro: Preferi să te ghemuiești lângă copii.
translations.da: Du foretrækker at sætte dig på hug ved børnene.
translations.ja: 子どもたちのそばでしゃがむほうが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the main verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Clitic reflexive pronoun for 2nd person singular; attached to the infinitive of the pronominal verb.
Infinitive verb; part of the pronominal construction with 't'', complement of 'préfères'.
Preposition forming the complex preposition 'près de' meaning 'near'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'les'; introduces the noun phrase complement of 'près'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition ('près de').

translations.en: They crouch in front of the puppy.
translations.de: Sie gehen vor dem Welpen in die Hocke.
translations.pt: Eles se agacham na frente do filhote.
translations.vi: Họ ngồi xổm trước con chó con.
translations.hi: वे पिल्ले के सामने उकड़ूँ बैठते हैं.
translations.nb: De setter seg på huk foran valpen.
translations.id: Mereka berjongkok di depan anak anjing.
translations.da: De sætter sig på hug foran hvalpen.
translations.ja: 彼らは子犬の前でしゃがむ。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the main verb.
Clitic reflexive pronoun for 3rd person; attached before the pronominal verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; used pronominally with 's''.
Preposition meaning 'in front of'; takes a noun phrase complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines the following noun.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: On s'accroupit pour regarder sous le lit.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sakʁupi puʁ ʁəɡaʁde su lə li/

translations.fr: On s'accroupit pour regarder sous le lit.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sakʁupi puʁ ʁəɡaʁde su lə li/
translations.en: We crouch to look under the bed.
translations.es: Nos agachamos para mirar debajo de la cama.
translations.de: Wir gehen in die Hocke, um unter das Bett zu schauen.
translations.it: Ci accovacciamo per guardare sotto il letto.
translations.ko: 우리는 침대 밑을 보려고 쭈그려 앉는다.
translations.ru: Мы приседаем, чтобы посмотреть под кровать.
translations.pt: Nós nos agachamos para olhar debaixo da cama.
translations.he: אנחנו מתכופפים כדי להסתכל מתחת למיטה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ngồi xổm để nhìn dưới gầm giường.
translations.nl: We hurken om onder het bed te kijken.
translations.uk: Ми присідаємо, щоб подивитися під ліжко.
translations.hu: Leguggolunk, hogy benézzünk az ágy अलá.
translations.hi: हम बिस्तर के नीचे देखने के लिए उकड़ूँ बैठते हैं.
translations.el: Σκύβουμε για να κοιτάξουμε κάτω από το κρεβάτι.
translations.nb: Vi setter ons på huk for å se under sengen.
translations.id: Kami berjongkok untuk melihat ke bawah tempat tidur.
translations.sv: Vi hukar oss för att titta under sängen.
translations.ro: Ne ghemuim ca să ne uităm sub pat.
translations.cs: Dřepneme si, abychom se podívali pod postel.
translations.da: Vi sætter os på hug for at kigge under sengen.
translations.ja: ベッドの下をのぞくためにしゃがむ。

Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'sous'.
